name: Tea-Curious Beginner
rank_basis: Highest-volume recurring discussion in r/tea; primary launch target
job_to_be_done: Help me try loose-leaf tea without feeling stupid or wasting money.
trigger: Saw tea content on social, bored of grocery/bag tea, wants a better daily drink
core_complaints: fear of buying a large bag they won't finish
desired_offer: 3-tea starter sampler, brew cards, beginner taste notes, no extra gear required
best_copy: Your first loose-leaf box. Three teas, simple brew cards, zero guesswork.
product_implication: Include one bold black, one caffeine-free herbal/rooibos, one smooth green or oolong
source: Drink Varitea — Foundational Brand Brief v1.0, Segment 1

name: Coffee Refugee
job_to_be_done: Help me replace my coffee habit without losing the morning ritual or the energy.
trigger: Coffee anxiety, doctor advice, sleep problems, productivity optimization
core_complaints: unsure which teas have enough kick
premium tea tastes bland without guidance
desired_offer: Coffee-to-tea starter path with a high-caffeine option, caffeine slider/label, taste comparison
best_copy: A better morning cup for when coffee stops working for you.
product_implication: Every tea must show a caffeine label: none / low / medium / high
source: Drink Varitea — Foundational Brand Brief v1.0, Segment 2

name: Thoughtful Gifter
job_to_be_done: Help me give a thoughtful gift that feels personal but is easy to buy.
trigger: Birthday, thank-you, housewarming, holiday, Mother's Day, Secret Santa
core_complaints: custom options on other sites are clunky or ugly
desired_offer: 3-tea gift box, optional name label, gift note, visually polished packaging
best_copy: A tea gift that feels chosen, not grabbed.
product_implication: Add a 'Send as a gift' checkbox; offer optional gift note; ensure premium unboxing
source: Drink Varitea — Foundational Brand Brief v1.0, Segment 3

name: Orphaned Discovery Subscriber
rank_basis: Days 31-60; demand real but execution risk high
job_to_be_done: Help me keep discovering teas without committing to a subscription.
trigger: Sips By shutdown in 2024 left guided-discovery demand unmet
core_complaints: wants guided discovery without subscription commitment
no good replacement for Sips By
desired_offer: Guided discovery / curated boxes purchasable one-off, no subscription lock-in
best_copy: Guided tea discovery — no subscription required.
product_implication: Offer one-off curated boxes positioned as discovery, not commitment
source: Drink Varitea — Foundational Brand Brief v1.0, Secondary Segments

name: Flavor Explorer
rank_basis: Days 31-60; wants variety and interesting combinations
job_to_be_done: Help me find unique, interesting tea flavors I can't get at the grocery store.
trigger: Boredom with standard flavors; seeking novelty
core_complaints: hard to find flavored or unique loose-leaf sources
desired_offer: Rotating unique blends; flavors like mango, hibiscus, elderberry, cinnamon, ginger
best_copy: Flavors you won't find on the grocery shelf.
product_implication: Maintain a rotating roster of distinctive flavored blends
source: Drink Varitea — Foundational Brand Brief v1.0, Secondary Segments
